ChatGPT Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

MakerOpenAI
CategoryAI Chatbots & Assistants, AI Writing Tools, AI Research & Search
PricingFree plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit ChatGPT →

Best for

General-purpose assistant for writing, brainstorming, coding, and quick research.

Pros

  • Extremely versatile across writing, coding, and research tasks
  • Strong free tier with GPT-5 access
  • Huge plugin/GPT ecosystem and mobile apps

Cons

  • Free tier has usage limits and can be slower at peak times
  • Can occasionally produce confident but incorrect answers

Alternatives to ChatGPT

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Perplexity

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

Jasper

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
